narrative:
Guernsey County has 23,608 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.7% of registrants.
